creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ portlint -A
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/_/}_${PORTVERSION}$...".
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/_/}_${PORTVERSION}$...".
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

Those are false positives. portlint(1) doesn't like :S with / (slash) as a separator in DISTFILES and EXTRACT_ONLY.
